For meetups and in-person intros

Your identity, ready to share.
Save your links once and share them instantly.

How it works in real life.

Blurb is just a quicker way to share who you are during a meetup.

01

Save your links

Add your socials, website, or any profile you want to share.

prnsh.site QR
x.com/prnshtwt QR
02

Show the QR

Instead of spelling out usernames, just open the card and let them scan.

prnsh.site
03

They get your page

One scan takes them straight to your link, like handing over a visiting card.

Open in browser

Why people use it.

It keeps sharing simple, quick, and a lot less awkward.

No handle hunting

No typing your name out or waiting for someone to search for you.

Faster sharing

Your links are ready before the conversation even starts.

One place for everything

Keep your website, socials, and other profiles in one app.

Like a visiting card

Except it opens the actual page immediately instead of sitting in someone’s pocket.

One scan takes them straight to your page.

No typing your name. No searching for your profile.

QR view prnsh.site Scan → open

Want to talk?

Reach out for feedback, support, or anything else about the app.

Blurb is a simple way to share your identity quickly at meetups.
